name: OmopEthnicity
title: OMOP Ethnicity (one Athena concept per Patient)
description: A Patient.extension that carries OMOP's ethnicity for this person directly as an Athena Standard concept reference. OMOP `person.ethnicity_concept_id` is a single integer; the two top-level Standard concepts are 38003563 (Hispanic or Latino) and 38003564 (Not Hispanic or Latino). Use this when the source feed already speaks OMOP; use `us-core-ethnicity` (and let the ETL map via `cm.ethnicity_omb_to_omop`) when the source speaks OMB.

element.short: OMOP ethnicity for this Patient — one concept

binding.description: One of the two Athena Ethnicity-vocabulary Standard concepts (Hispanic / Not Hispanic).
